description: Telegram AI Brain + SaaS Compiler Upgrade

changes.content: export async function handleCommand(cmd) { cmd = cmd.toLowerCase(); if(cmd.startsWith('build')) { return buildSaaS(cmd); } if(cmd.includes('deploy')) { return triggerGitHub('deploy'); } return 'ok'; }

- name: V15 Patch Loader
  run: echo 'Applying V15 upgrade layer'
